current_priority: Stabilize the new equipment and loot stat pipeline without regressing the playable LAN extraction loop.
recently_completed: Created canonical repo memory system under docs/agent/
Reframed execution plan around a 2D playable vertical slice
Refactored GameScene into a readable 2D battlefield layout
Refactored player, monster, and drop markers into more game-like 2D entities
Fixed LAN default server URL resolution and Phaser canvas resize issues
Added scripted backend E2E loop coverage for create -> join -> start -> combat -> pickup -> extract -> settlement
Revalidated equipment and loot stat pipeline with passing client/server TypeScript checks
Hardened backend LAN/mobile connectivity with permissive default CORS, explicit Socket.IO polling fallback, and less aggressive ping timeouts
Adjusted backend combat tuning: doubled player weapon ranges, implemented blade/spear server skill handlers, and reduced monster damage/range to the latest GDD values

Retuned combat again: doubled player weapon ranges a second time, increased all implemented skill damage by 10x, normalized all skill cooldowns to 3 seconds, rebuilt shared/dist, and revalidated client/server TypeScript checks

Improve combat and interaction feedback beyond static markers

coordination_rule: During external frontend optimization work, avoid breaking protocol or gameplay baseline used for UI testing.
